name: Headrush Arena
summary: Play the Most Ridiculous VR Shooter on Quest **Wishlist Now! To join our play test and get early access**  Collect weapons, power ups and knowledge coins to climb the leader boards. Steal from robots or you friends. The more you collect the bigger your head the stronger you get, the higher you jump and the funnier you sound.   Early Access Includes: 2 maps - Chaos Arena & The Factory 3 modes - FFA, TDM, PvE 2 game types - Arcade Style or Party style  6 Custom Upgrade Types
